zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，关注突破方向
zh.content:
当前价格报73.59，日内上涨1.04%，运行区间介于72.48至73.60之间，显示多头略占优势，但价格仍受二十日均线压制，整体维持震荡偏强格局，短线或继续围绕均线反复争夺方向。

技术指标方面，MACD数值为-0.128，仍位于零轴下方，说明空头动能尚未完全消退，但若柱体持续缩短，则有望迎来修复。RSI数据暂缺，因此需结合成交量与后续K线形态共同确认趋势强弱。

关键支撑位可关注72.48附近，若失守则可能进一步测试72.00区域；上方首要阻力位位于73.60，若有效放量突破，则有机会挑战74.00至74.50区间，届时市场情绪有望进一步改善。

交易策略建议以顺势操作为主，激进投资者可等待突破73.60后轻仓跟进，稳健者宜观察回踩支撑后的企稳信号再考虑布局。同时严格设置止损，控制仓位，避免震荡行情带来的频繁回撤风险。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading at 73.59 after a modest 1.04% daily gain, recovering toward the upper end of the session range between 72.48 and 73.60. Despite the positive intraday performance, price remains slightly below the 20-period simple moving average at 73.968, suggesting short-term momentum has not fully shifted in favor of buyers. The market appears to be consolidating rather than establishing a decisive directional trend, with participants waiting for stronger confirmation before committing to larger positions.

Technical indicators provide a mixed picture. The available MACD reading of -0.128 indicates bearish momentum has not completely faded, although the absence of the signal line limits confidence in assessing whether a bullish crossover is developing. Likewise, the unavailable RSI prevents a reliable evaluation of overbought or oversold conditions. Until additional indicator confirmation emerges, price action around the 20-period moving average may offer the clearest insight into whether bullish momentum is strengthening or weakening.

From a price structure perspective, immediate support is located near 72.50, aligning with the recent session low, while a deeper pullback could expose the 72.00 region as the next area of interest. Initial resistance sits around 74.00, close to the 20-period moving average, followed by a stronger barrier near 75.00 if buyers regain control. A sustained break above resistance would improve the technical outlook, while failure to hold support could invite renewed selling pressure.

Traders may prefer a patient approach until the market confirms direction with stronger volume and momentum signals. Aggressive participants could consider bullish opportunities only after a convincing move above the moving average and nearby resistance, while conservative traders may wait for additional confirmation from RSI and MACD signal data. Conversely, repeated rejection below 74.00 combined with weakness under 72.50 would favor a defensive stance and tighter risk management, including disciplined stop-loss placement.
